## 📚 FAQ Topic
What IT topic should be covered?

## ❓ Suggested Question
The question users might ask.

## ✅ Suggested Answer
The answer or solution to provide.

## 🏷️ Category
Which category does this belong to? (e.g. Network, Email, Security, Hardware)
